Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We just finished watching a[n]hard-boiled fiction movie together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}That action scene during the climax was amazing, wasn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I gained some {f 4 30 2 1 1 0} after[n]watching how a man of conviction lives...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Speaking of action scenes, Japan's live-action superhero shows are just as good. Really![n]{f 1 1}
